math_definition: x if x>=0; ((lower+upper)/2)*x if x<0 (eval mode); a~U(lower,upper)*x if x<0 (train mode); lower=0.125, upper=1/3

ranking_rationale: leaky_relu=structurally identical to rrelu eval mode (conditional x*slope for negative), prelu=same pattern in sfpi high-level style with Converter::as_float param handling, dropout=PRNG seed init and per-element random generation pattern for training mode, rand=uniform distribution generation to [lower,upper] range directly needed for training mode slope, selu=two-parameter management template (bit-cast uint32_t params, dual Converter::as_float loads)
